The '''Zabrak Disruptor Cannon''' was a [[Disruptor/Legends|disruptor]]-type weapon that was created by the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] race of [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. They were large weapons and designed for heavy use in front-line combat.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
